{ "name": "sebastian/complexity", "description": "Library for calculating the complexity of PHP code units", "type": "library", "homepage": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/complexity", "license": "BSD-3-Clause", "authors": [ { "name": "Sebastian Bergmann", "email": "sebastian@phpunit.de", "role": "lead" } ], "support": { "issues": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/complexity/issues", "security": "https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/complexity/security/policy" }, "prefer-stable": true, "require": { "php": ">=8.3", "nikic/php-parser": "^5.0" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^12.0" }, "config": { "platform": { "php": "8.3.0" }, "optimize-autoloader": true, "sort-packages": true }, "autoload": { "classmap": [ "src/" ] }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-main": "5.0-dev" } } }
